title: NIST CSF 2.0 skill telemetry event schema
description: Schema for telemetry events emitted by the nist-csf-2 skill stub and (in production) the real skill executor. Mirrors the 5 on-Spine skills' telemetry format.

uc_id.description: The use case id (e.g., UC-01, UC-02, UC-03) or 'none' for non-UC invocations

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the operation in milliseconds

context.description: Optional context — input schema version, payload size, etc.

result_summary.description: Optional summary of the operation result (no PII, no full output)
